title: Clipper
description: Clips overflowing button text with scrolling animation like in the new Minecraft versions (>1.13)
body:
**This mod clips overflowing button text with scrolling animation and adds 6px paddings to the every UI button in the game. Like in the new Minecraft versions (>1.13)**

[1] The example is shown in the [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) settings menu in the Russian localisation, where the text did not fit within the buttons

NO **Clipper** INSTALLED [1]: 
![NO Clipper Installed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a23d5fcbeb12e32501c694eaae29f4a82b90f40_0.webp)

**Clipper** INSTALLED [1]:
![Clipper Installed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d36d3bc72402e30170051eb8d5948fa2ea97f06.gif)
